title: Run LilyGO native_sim and hardware build matrix
description: Why this exists: build success needs to be demonstrated locally or on the prepared Linux Zephyr builder, and hardware target memory usage must be tracked. What needs to be done: run native_sim packet-path tests, build selected LilyGO target app firmware, capture generated config and memory usage, and use EC2 Zephyr cache for Linux-only native_sim/build work if local macOS cannot run it. Acceptance criteria: native_sim tests pass or failing Beads are filed; selected LilyGO firmware build passes; memory usage is recorded; EC2 resources are cleaned up if used; build commands are documented in Beads notes or support docs.
notes:
Native_sim packet-path validation uncovered and fixed a coap_client test-harness issue. Initial EC2 command: west twister -p native_sim --inline-logs -O build/twister-native-packet -T lichen/tests/ping_l2 -T lichen/tests/link_crypto -T lichen/tests/schc_generic -T lichen/tests/oscore -T lichen/tests/coap_client -T lichen/tests/app_interface -T lichen/tests/gateway_config -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble -T lichen/tests/meshcore_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshcore_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshcore_ble -T lichen/tests/ble_app_owner -T lichen/tests/hal. Result before fix: 24 selected, 22/24 passed, 1 failed, 1 static skip in 571.49s; failed net.lichen.coap_client.api with kernel assertion invalid priority 15, CONFIG_COAP_CLIENT_THREAD_PRIORITY=15 colliding with idle priority on native_sim. Direct experiment with OVERLAY_CONFIG CONFIG_COAP_CLIENT_THREAD_PRIORITY=14 built and ran lichen/tests/coap_client successfully: 5/5 ztest cases passed. Implemented scoped fix in lichen/tests/coap_client/prj.conf. Focused rerun: west twister -p native_sim --inline-logs -O build/twister-coap-client-fix -T lichen/tests/coap_client -> 1/1 configurations passed, 5 test cases, 0 warnings in 29.29s. Full rerun: west twister -p native_sim --inline-logs -O build/twister-native-packet-fixed [same -T list] -> 24 selected, 23/24 executed passed (100%), 1 static skip, 0 failed/errors, 361 test cases, 44 skipped, 0 warnings in 562.19s. Reviews: Popper the 6th clean; Aquinas the 6th clean, qemu_x86 build passed in review, qemu run blocked by unrelated /tmp/slip.sock.
T-Deck firmware build matrix on EC2 builder i-05e27e074db786e22 (us-east-2a), EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr, repo d1c2033b, Zephyr v3.7.0, SDK 0.16.8. Commands: west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build/t_deck_gateway; west build -d build/t_deck_gateway -t ram_report; west build -d build/t_deck_gateway -t rom_report; west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/puck -d build/t_deck_puck; west build -d build/t_deck_puck -t ram_report; west build -d build/t_deck_puck -t rom_report. Gateway build passed; generated build/t_deck_gateway/zephyr/{.config,zephyr.dts,zephyr.map,zephyr.elf,zephyr.bin,runners.yaml}; image files: zephyr.bin 210K, zephyr.elf 5.5M. Gateway linker memory: FLASH 214740 B / 16776960 B (1.28%); iram0_0_seg 51484 B / 329 KB (15.28%); dram0_0_seg 99592 B / 313 KB (31.07%); irom0_0_seg 116462 B / 16 MB (0.69%); drom0_0_seg 149204 B / 16 MB (0.89%); RTC regions 0. Gateway config highlights: CONFIG_FLASH_SIZE=16777216, CONFIG_ESPTOOLPY_FLASHSIZE=16MB, CONFIG_LICHEN_BOARD_NAME="LilyGO T-Deck", CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_SX126X=y, CONFIG_LORA_SX126X=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_BLE_LOCAL/ SERIAL_LOCAL / DISPLAY / GNSS / BATTERY / PMIC / EXTERNAL_FLASH disabled, CONFIG_SLIP=n, CONFIG_BT=n. Gateway warnings: CMake warned no SOURCES for drivers__net; size_report emitted repeated symbols with section None not in RAM or ROM. Puck build passed; generated build/t_deck_puck/zephyr/{.config,zephyr.dts,zephyr.map,zephyr.elf,zephyr.bin,runners.yaml}; image files: zephyr.bin 200K, zephyr.elf 4.5M. Puck linker memory: FLASH 204288 B / 16776960 B (1.22%); iram0_0_seg 49852 B / 329 KB (14.80%); dram0_0_seg 70968 B / 313 KB (22.14%); irom0_0_seg 67358 B / 16 MB (0.40%); drom0_0_seg 138752 B / 16 MB (0.83%); RTC regions 0. Puck config highlights: CONFIG_FLASH_SIZE=16777216, CONFIG_ESPTOOLPY_FLASHSIZE=16MB, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_SX126X=y, CONFIG_LORA_SX126X=y, no BLE/local/display/GNSS/battery/PMIC app services enabled. Puck warnings: size_report emitted repeated symbols with section None not in RAM or ROM. Hardware flash/boot/radio/local-client smoke remains outside this no-hardware Bead and is covered by existing hardware follow-ups project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.10, .11, .5.1, .6/.6.1, .7, .8, .13.1, .14.1.
Closure note: bd close without --force refused because project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.5, project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.6, and project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.14 remain open/blocked. Those are physical radio/local-client/partition-validation gates. The no-hardware scope of this build-matrix Bead is complete: native_sim packet-path Twister passes, T-Deck gateway and puck firmware builds pass, memory/config/warnings are recorded, and hardware validation is already tracked by existing child/follow-up Beads. Force-closing this Bead to avoid conflating completed no-hardware build evidence with unavailable physical validation.
EC2 cleanup after build matrix: sync completed; initial umount was busy because cleanup shell cwd was under /mnt/lichen-zephyr, retried from / and unmounted successfully; detached EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and waited until available; terminated instance i-05e27e074db786e22 and waited terminated; deleted temporary security group sg-04cb68a4cf9e4831f; final volume state available with no attachments.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware native_sim/T-Deck build matrix on EC2 with evidence recorded; remaining physical validation is tracked in existing hardware-blocked Beads.
